# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the latest version on the `main` branch is supported with security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Vazen, please report it by either:

- **Opening a new issue** in this repository at [github.com/stack-found/vazen/issues](https://github.com/stack-found/vazen/issues)
- **Sending a DM** on X at [@stackfound](https://x.com/stackfound)

We will do our best to respond promptly and address the issue as soon as possible.
